aids.title: Paging Formulas
aids.content:
Page Number = LA / Page Size
Offset = LA % Page Size
Physical = Frame × Page Size + Offset

Offset bits = log2(Page Size)
Page bits = Address bits - Offset bits

aids.title: Effective Access Time
aids.content:
EAT = hit_rate × (TLB + Mem) + 
 miss_rate × (TLB + 2×Mem)

With TLB: Faster overall access
Without: Always 2 memory accesses

aids.title: Page Table Entry Bits
aids.content:
• Frame number
• Valid/Invalid bit
• Protection (R/W/X)
• Dirty bit (modified?)
• Reference bit (accessed?)
